description_long: This is a single tan work boot with a rugged, worn appearance, featuring a thick, beige rubber sole and a padded dark gray collar for ankle support. The upper is made of scuffed leather, showing visible creases and dirt marks, indicating extensive use. The boot has a standard criss-cross lacing system with yellowish-brown laces threaded through metal eyelets. The side of the boot displays the word 'TRAILBLAZE' stamped or printed in a subtle, slightly faded font. The heel is reinforced, and the toe area is rounded and heavily worn, with the overall structure remaining intact. The interior appears to be lined with a softer, likely fabric material for comfort.
description: A tan, heavily worn work boot with a thick rubber sole, padded gray collar, and criss-cross laces. The leather upper is scuffed and marked, with 'TRAILBLAZE' branding on the side.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the 'TRAILBLAZE' branding, scuffed leather, and full lacing system.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the padded gray collar, reinforced heel, and back seam details.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the worn leather upper, laces, and absence of visible branding.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the rounded, heavily worn toe, laces, and tongue.
